attacking_style: Launches solo attacks from GC groups on long sustained climbs to claw back time when sitting outside top-10, but lacks explosive acceleration for steep punchy finishes. Prefers endurance-based efforts over short, violent accelerations.
team_tactics: Team delivers him via massive tempo control to podium positions, but he's often isolated when pure accelerations begin. Positioned aggressively to initiate moves on earlier climbs even from modest GC positions. Limited domestique support in final kilometers.
terrain_preference: Excels on long, sustained climbs like Angliru (stage win) but explicitly vulnerable on steep, punchy gradients requiring explosive power. Deteriorates on climbs exceeding 5500m cumulative elevation and in third week of Grand Tours.
vulnerability: Crosswinds and non-mountain terrain expose major weakness for GC ambitions. Cracks on final steep pitches after being well-positioned. Loses time through poor positioning in critical splits (missed 65km-to-go Bora tempo). Third-week climbing form deteriorates consistently.
key_patterns: Dropped on final steep climbs despite podium positioning; lacks explosive acceleration (4+ instances)
Third-week Grand Tour deterioration: form visibly declining after Stage 16-17 (3 instances)
Crosswind vulnerability costs significant time despite GC contender status (2 documented instances)
Conservative pacing on flats gains GC positions while aggressive rivals implode (2 instances)
Fights back after being dropped on long climbs, showing endurance over punch (3 instances)
Attacks solo from GC groups when outside top-10, clawing time opportunistically (3 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed recovery ability and willingness to animate races (Tirreno, Giro attacks), but ceiling appears outside top-5 with persistent weakness on 5500m+ stages and inability to drop equivalent climbers
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 3
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 11
